channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on Utility Unit - Hanover Park Road, 18th March
item.description:
Please remove the graffiti tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-16, Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5-10 large bags of waste / rubbish dumped, 18th March
item.description:
Dumped in parking bay. Already ripped open. Potential glass etc / dangerous items.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting is off on path., 18th March
item.description:
Street lighting is off
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timber Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 wheelie bins full and a trolly dumped,, 18th March
item.description:
Looks like rotting food so rats will be attracted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashburnham Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement sink hole, 18th March
item.description:
Small but deep hole in pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knoll Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road works with zero signs, dangerous to cycle, 18th March
item.description:
Since the road works have started there’s inadequate signage on where to cycle and the white line delimiting the available cycle lane on the left side, going towards the roundabout, is invisibly raised leading many bikes to hit it and lose balance. I’ve risked accidents 3 days in a row cycling along the road with the roadworks as the roadworks narrowed the available road to a point where cars close bikes in, or taking over a car puts a cyclist in front of oncoming traffic. Please improve signs and close the cycle lane if it’s not ready.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 344, Queenstown Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish bag, 18th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in Ditch Alley. Bin bag affixed to lampost persistantly overfowing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Franklin Place, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandals lit a fire on the new roundabout in the children's playground, 18th March
item.description:
The fire was lit with paper, but they used the new shrubs which were along the perimeter fence as fuel. The Friends have taken 5 shrubs and have put them in water in the container and will try and salvage and replant elsewhere. Friends cleared the ashes and bits of wood away. However, the surface of the roundabout was previously damaged by another fire and now sections are lifting. It could be a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th March
item.description:
Various rotting items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 18th March
item.description:
Large pothole measuring at least 40cm x 25cm x 10cm deep My entire wheel went into the pothole causing damage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has not moved for 1 week and is parked tight and blocking car access, 18th March
item.description:
As above. Grey toyota
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 130A, Parish Gate Drive, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 18th March
item.description:
Large and very deep pothole on near sir edge of carriageway adjoining the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill

item.title: Water coming up from the drain hole covers, 18th March
item.description:
Blocked drains backing up. Water coming up out from the drain hole covers and flooding the parking area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Mattresses left outside flats, 18th March
item.description:
Mattresses left outside need clearing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Hampstead Heath bus stop route 210, 18th March
item.description:
Hampstead Heath bus stop route 210 either side of the road is completely smashed and Spaniards inn bus stop is also shattard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boundary Path, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Heavy (laughing?) gas canister abandoned on pavement, 18th March
item.description:
On the north side of Dalston Lane, opposite no. 182, at the base of a young tree a heavy gas canister has been abandoned
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
There is a broken chest of drawers and some large pieces of wood dumped on the pavement on the corner of Norway Gate and Redriff Road. Please can this be cleared away. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norway Gate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall along Bonding Yard Walk, 18th March
item.description:
There is some graffiti on a wall on Bonding Yard Walk, at the Finland Street end. Please could this be cleaned off. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1,3, Bonding Yard Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 18 Glengall Rd, 18th March
item.description:
Wooden pallet left on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Wood Chippings., 18th March
item.description:
After the tree was trimmed today, a load of wood chippings has been left in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kechill Gardens, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
